title: Steam Deck Essentials
description: The essential mods you need to get started on a Steam Deck device.
body:
Steam Deck Essentials is a a modpack that includes all the mods needed to get started on a Steam Deck. The included mods add support for controller to the game, making it easier to navigate inside Minecraft and play the game without having to attach a mouse or keyboard to your Steam Deck device. it also includes a few common performance improvement mods to make your framerate better/more stable.

Included Mods:
* Sodium
* Lithium
* Controlify
* YetAnotherConfigLib (Controlify Dependency)
* Mod Menu
* ImmediatelyFast
* Fabric API
